holdings.infoBox: WDNA is an equity ETF with a total of 80 individual holdings. The top holdings are Twist Bioscience stock at 5.27%, Eli Lilly and Company at 4.33%, Moderna at 3.48%, Johnson & Johnson at 3.11%, and United Therapeutics at 2.80%.

overview.description: The WisdomTree BioRevolution Fund (WDNA) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the WisdomTree BioRevolution index. The fund tracks a modified equally-weighted index of companies in developed markets that focus on the advancements in genetics and biotechnology. WDNA was launched on Jun 3, 2021 and is issued by WisdomTree.
